title: Zhu Hexin: New landscape of global capital flows and China's high-level opening-up
body:
Keynote speech by Mr Zhu Hexin, Deputy Governor of the People's Bank of China and SAFE Administrator, at the 2026 Lujiazui Forum, Shanghai, 17 June 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260701e.htm
